descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Dartmouth Fuel Kids 7-3 in Centennial Cup championship game.
descriptionLong: Jason Phillips scored three goals as the Richmond Sockeyes dominated the Dartmouth Fuel Kids 7-3 to win the Centennial Cup junior-A hockey championship in Humboldt, Saskatchewan on May 3, 1987. Bryon Moller, Steve Jaques, Dave Tomlinson, and Matt Hervey also scored for Richmond, who outshot Dartmouth 44-29 and led 3-1 after the first period.
